gizmo.title: Image Gallery
gizmo.description: A gallery that presents images in grid, masonry, or slideshow layouts.

configure.title: Display mode
configure.description: How to present the images in the gallery.

advanced.title: Active index
advanced.description: Index of the active image to start on in gallery mode.
